releaseBlockingGates.description: Post-merge CI aggregate that proves trusted main verification lanes are green.
releaseBlockingGates.remediation: Re-run main-verify and inspect failing lane summaries under artifacts/ci-lanes/.

releaseBlockingGates.description: Deploy workflow aggregate that enforces local deploy prerequisites and upstream gate status.
releaseBlockingGates.remediation: Re-run deploy release-readiness and fix failing local gate in deploy.yml release-gate-contract needs.

releaseBlockingGates.description: OWASP ZAP DAST gate executed inside the deploy workflow before production promotion.
releaseBlockingGates.remediation: Review deploy DAST artifacts and suppress only validated false positives in .zap/false-positives.json.

releaseBlockingGates.description: Verifies runtime code matches architecture documentation claims (eventing stack, agent inventory, deployment entities). Fails if docs and code diverge.
coverage: eventing stack claims (MessageBus, BullMQ, NATS JetStream)
releaseBlockingGates.remediation: Update docs/AGENTS.md or runtime implementation, then rerun scripts/ci/check-architecture-doc-drift.mjs.

releaseBlockingGates.description: Verifies child_process.exec (from dev.ts) is absent from the production backend bundle. Prevents latent RCE risk from dev route code shipping in production.
coverage: child_process import absent from production bundle
dev route registration absent from production bundle
releaseBlockingGates.remediation: Remove dev-only route imports from production bundle and rerun scripts/ci/check-backend-dev-routes-excluded.mjs.

releaseBlockingGates.description: Fails if any K8s base manifest sets LOG_LEVEL to warn/error/fatal. The shared logger defaults to info in production; a more restrictive override silently drops audit-critical info/warn logs from auth, tenant, and subscription paths.
coverage: K8s base manifests set LOG_LEVEL to info or debug
shared logger audit trail visibility in production
releaseBlockingGates.remediation: Set production LOG_LEVEL to info/debug in manifests and rerun CI gate.

releaseBlockingGates.description: Fails if any production-path env file or K8s/Helm manifest sets MFA_ENABLED=false. MFA defaults to enabled in code; this gate catches explicit opt-outs.
coverage: production env files do not disable MFA
K8s/Helm manifests do not disable MFA
releaseBlockingGates.remediation: Remove MFA_ENABLED=false from production-path config and rerun CI gate.

releaseBlockingGates.description: Verifies required compliance evidence documents exist and are non-empty. Blocks production promotion when evidence artifacts are missing.
releaseBlockingGates.remediation: Populate required docs/security-compliance evidence files and rerun main-verify staging deploy gates.
